claim: 3D scroll-driven animations using a video playing in sync with scroll position can create the illusion of interactive 3D experiences
actionable: Create two product images (assembled and exploded), generate a transition video between them using an AI video tool, then sync the video playback to user scroll position with Three.js
source_title: Everyone Builds 3D Websites with Claude Code. I Sell Them for $10K.
